title: AuditShareVerifiedRequest
description: audit-share v0.2 sub-protocol — VerifiedAuditRequest JSON Schema

auditShareVersion.description: audit-share protocol version; the sole v0.2 value is '1.0.0'

token.description: = DelegatedAuditKey.auditKeyId; UUID v4 format (same format as csp UuidV4String; guarded by the AuditKeyId brand factory toAuditKeyId)

disclosedClaims.description: selective disclosure projected field subset; each item must belong to the AuditEventField enum (15 items frozen); AJV uniqueItems prevents duplicates

challenge.description: verifier-side issued nonce; UUID v4 format (csp; single-use)

audience.description: = target domain DID; strict audience binding (csp F2; startsWith did: guards against hijack)

notAfter.description: independent expiry window for the csp signed payload; ISO 8601 UTC (csp I5 stale-replay defense)

requestedScope.description: L3 manager fetch by scope brand; the factory toAuditShareScope guard rejects sentinel enumeration

tenantId.description: atp v0.1 tenant isolation primary key; sentinel enumeration is enforced at the factory layer

auditClass.description: atp v0.1 three-tier audit isolation; L1=public / L2=tenant-scoped / L3=principal-scoped

chainNamespace.description: Optional chain namespace (atp/policy/governance); if provided must be non-empty and non-sentinel

requesterSignature.description: Ed25519 hex/base64url signature; the requester's private key signs canonicalize(request minus requesterSignature)
